overview: IC SPICY is a full-stack E-commerce and RWA NFT platform for a Florida nursery specializing in rare and hot chili plants. Features a 8888-NFT pre-generated composite pool, admin pool dashboard, plant lifecycle NFTs, NIMS tray management, DAO governance, multi-token wallet, and a marketplace for plants and artisan products.
features: 8888 pre-generated composite NFT pool (5K Common / 2.8K Uncommon / 1K Rare)
Admin pool dashboard with Ready/Airdropped/Shop/QR inventory counters
Batch and individual NFT assignment to airdrop, shop, or QR pickup
Zip file artwork upload to dedicated on-chain asset canister
10-layer composite NFT artwork with rarity-based discounts
Founders Collection (50 unique membership NFTs with badge overlay)
NIMS 72-cell tray management with lifecycle tracking
Multi-token wallet (ICP, ckBTC, ckETH, ckUSDC, ckUSDT)
